title: Sub-item summary is slow to update
excerpt:
Currently: 
A board with subitems with a summary of the Sum of a sub-item column. 
Problem: 
When updating the sub-item values, the summary is Not updated. 
I have to reload the page to see the updated Sum of the summary…

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently:
A board with subitems with a summary of the Sum of a sub-item column.

Problem:
When updating the sub-item values, the summary is Not updated.
I have to reload the page to see the updated Sum of the summary.

seems like a bug
